query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS job_returns (
  id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
  driver_id INT NOT NULL,
  order_id INT NOT NULL,
  reason VARCHAR(255),
  returned_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX jr_driver_id_idx (driver_id),
  INDEX jr_order_id_idx (order_id),
  INDEX jr_returned_at_idx (returned_at)
);
ALTER TABLE drivers ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS total_returns INT DEFAULT 0;
